sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n4772" key="a)lfiteu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀλφῐτ-εύω</orth>, <sense id="n4772.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">grind barley,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0233.tlg001:46" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hippon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">46</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
